component.name: Newfoundsync
component.summary: LAN audio sharing with tight multi-room sync

description.p: Newfoundsync streams this PC's audio to any browser on the local network and keeps every device playing in lock-step (sub-millisecond on a LAN). This is the desktop server: pick an audio source, and listeners just open a web page — nothing to install on their end.
Audio is Opus over HTTPS + WebSocket; clients clock-sync NTP-style and schedule each frame to a shared deadline. Includes per-device volume/sync trim and mic auto-calibration.
